name: Bitauto Holdings Limited
description: Bitauto Holdings Limited is a leading provider of internet content and marketing services, and transaction services for China's fast-growing automotive industry. The company's business consists of three segments: advertising and subscription business, transaction services business, and digital marketing solutions business. Bitauto provides consumer-focused content and transaction services through its Bitauto App and websites, helping automakers and dealers reach and transact with customers.
